product: Updated tag search syntax in workspace search
tagline: The workspace search syntax for searching tables and views by tag has been updated.
what_it_does: The workspace search syntax for searching tables and views by tag has been updated. To search by both tag key and value, use the syntax tag:<tag key :<tag value . Previously, the syntax was to omit tag: when searching by both key and value.
why_it_matters: Popularity Search uses popularity signals based on how often other users in your workspace are interacting with specific tables to improve how tables are ranked.
plain_summary: The workspace search syntax for searching tables and views by tag has been updated. To search by both tag key and value, use the syntax tag:<tag key :<tag value .
key_takeaway: The workspace search syntax for searching tables and views by tag has been updated.
